name: Ardanor
description:
Ardanor is a dark and brutal medieval fantasy world divided into seven warring kingdoms.

Darkmir is a harsh northern realm with a militarized society and a ban on magic.

Elvarion is an eastern center of trade and magic, where power is shared by the king, guilds, and mages.

Vargrim is a tribal kingdom of half-human warriors marked by bloody conflicts and shamanistic magic.

Jaris is a southern slave-holding state with a powerful pirate fleet.

Silvast is a feudal kingdom with advanced biomagic and a strong devotion to protecting nature.

Kremborn is a mountainous technocratic kingdom with a powerful army and disdain for magic.

Tardelin is a center of intrigue and corruption where secret magic and science intertwine with crime.

All the lands are plagued by constant war, cruelty, and a struggle for power. Magic and science here are both sources of strength and causes of widespread suffering.

*****

I speak English terribly, and it takes up too many tokens to translate into Belarusian and Russian, so everything was translated using AI and may look crooked. In general, I would be extremely surprised if this bot is used by someone other than me
creator: Pabam
